description_long: This is a modern two-story house set within a fenced yard, featuring a flat roof and clean, rectangular lines. The property includes a spacious backyard with a swimming pool, a round hot tub, and a children's play structure. The house itself has large windows arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. The front entryway is defined by a covered porch with steps leading up to the main door, flanked by landscaped greenery and a paved driveway. The exterior is primarily finished in light-colored materials, with some darker accents on the roof and window frames. The surrounding yard is landscaped with trees, shrubs, and a mix of hardscape and softscape elements.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large asymmetrical windows, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool, hot tub, and play area. The property is enclosed by a fence and includes a covered front porch and driveway.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from an angled front perspective, highlighting the main entryway, driveway, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the backyard, showcasing the swimming pool, hot tub, and children's play structure, with the rear facade of the house visible.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the house from the opposite side, emphasizing the side yard, pool, and the flat roof structure.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a rear corner view, showing the back entry, upper story windows, and the overall fenced property layout.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, modern door, landscaped approach, and minimal decorative elements
